raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context first","name":"Before we get into specifics, what’s been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Nina set the agenda before any manager concern is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Late nights source","name":"What’s been driving the late nights for you?","description":"Surfaces whether the load is coming from scope, timing, or personal working patterns.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Load after pressure","name":"Now that the sprint pressure has eased, what’s still keeping your load high?","description":"Separates temporary push from a workload pattern that may have stuck around.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Invisible work","name":"Where has your work been harder to see than it should be?","description":"Explores recognition and visibility without assuming the reason credit is missing.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence bottleneck","name":"Where are you getting stuck when you try to move decisions forward?","description":"Maps the specific point where influence breaks down, whether it is people, process, or timing.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision path","name":"What usually has to happen before your input starts changing the plan?","description":"Surfaces how early Nina is being brought in and where her influence is landing too late.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Priority trade-off","name":"What are you choosing not to do over the next two weeks?","description":"Forces a real trade-off around near-term priorities and capacity.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What kind of support from me would actually change your week right now?","description":"Gets concrete about the help Nina wants, rather than generic support language.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-step move","name":"What’s the first concrete thing you want to shift before we next meet?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into a specific next move without opening a new thread.","purpose":"competency","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
